welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.text:
Thanks for visiting my digital dumpster. Right now there is not much I can show you since it will always be in an infinite development stage and will keep expanding and improving over time. I planned to leave any kind of content that I like or that I have developed myself, but since there is nothing for now, just keep clicking the nav buttons to see what stuff I have done elsewhere. The home, what you are seeing, will never have anything. Ignore it.

If you want, you can come back again sometime in the future to see what I have added, remember to use control + f5 to get the latest version of the page. ヾ(•ω•`)o

aboutMe.title: About me
aboutMe.description:
How do people introduce themselves without feeling weird?

Hey! I am Timmy(1236), I am 20 years old and I am from Uruguay!, I self proclaim myself as a 'backend software developer', although in reality I am just an introvert whose only hobbies are programming, playing games and designing things in 3D. You know, just another generic person. I have always been interested in creating that 'high quality digital art', but I was never really good at being creative. So all my creativity has always been limited to just a few lines of code, what you are seeing right now is an attempt to actually create something, thanks for visiting, I mean it.

website.description: My personal website hosted on Nekoweb, it will be my main site where I will keep all kinds of projects or blogs I make updated. If you see this text first, that means you are already viewing my page!

WIP.description: All other projects were removed because I want to move this whole section to a separate page, only my website remains in case someone wants to see the source code.
